task_completion.description: Enable the required render passes (Z, Mist, Normal, Diffuse Color, Glossy Direct, Ambient Occlusion)
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Blender 'View Layer Properties' panel, checkboxes for 'Z', 'Mist', 'Normal', 'Color' (under Diffuse), 'Direct' (under Glossy), and 'Ambient Occlusion' should be ticked.

task_completion.description: Set the output format to OpenEXR MultiLayer
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Blender 'Output Properties' panel, the File Format dropdown under the Output section should be set to 'OpenEXR MultiLayer'.

task_completion.description: Set the color depth to 32-bit Float
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Blender 'Output Properties' panel, under the OpenEXR settings, the Color Depth should be set to 'Float (Full)' or '32'.
A 'Blender Render' window or 'Image Editor' should be visible showing the rendered BMW car scene, or a progress bar indicating the scene is actively rendering.

task_completion.description: Save the rendered output to the specified .exr path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blender's 'Save As' dialog saving the image as 'bmw_passes.exr' in '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/', or a terminal/file manager showing the file exists at this exact path.

task_completion.description: Save the Blender project file to the specified .blend path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blender's 'Save As' dialog saving the project as 'bmw_vfx_setup.blend' in '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/', or a terminal/file manager showing the file exists at this exact path.

integrity.description: Agent used the Blender GUI to configure the scene and render settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating Blender's properties panels and menus, rather than just executing a pre-written script in the terminal to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent actually rendered the scene
integrity.visual_evidence: The render window should show the BMW scene being generated (e.g., rendering tiles/samples), rather than just renaming an existing image file.

integrity.description: Files were saved properly through the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used Blender's 'Save'/'Save As' functionality or internal scripting workspace, rather than using terminal commands like 'touch' to create empty files with the expected names.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected project file path is /home/ga/BlenderProjects/bmw_vfx_setup.blend. The expected render output path is /home/ga/BlenderProjects/bmw_passes.exr. The required render passes are Z, Mist, Normal, Diffuse Color, Glossy Direct, and Ambient Occlusion. The output format must be exactly OPEN_EXR_MULTILAYER with a 32-bit color depth (Float Full). The resulting .exr file must be at least 500KB in size.
